import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
// No YouTubeEmbed as no relevant videos were found in the source data.

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Tactical Simulator Gamepasses: Best Buys & Tier List 2026",
  description: "Maximize your Anime Tactical Simulator progression with our comprehensive gamepass tier list and buying guide for 2026. Prioritize the best gamepasses for efficiency.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/9333ea/fff?text=Anime+Tactical+Simulator+Gamepasses",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Anime Tactical Simulator Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- Prioritize **Anime Tactical Simulator gamepasses** that enhance unit slots and card opening for rapid progression.
- **S-Tier gamepasses** like "+2 Units Equip" and "Card Access" offer significant early-game advantages.
- **Avoid C-Tier gamepasses** such as "Mega Storage" and "Small Storage" as they provide minimal impact.
- Save your Robux for **high-impact purchases** that directly boost your power or efficiency.
- Consider **free alternatives** like Tower Mode for additional unit slots before spending on gamepasses.
</Callout>

Anime Tactical Simulator, the popular Roblox tower defense squad builder, offers a variety of gamepasses designed to enhance your gameplay experience and accelerate your progression. Deciding which gamepasses to invest in can be crucial for new and veteran players alike, as they provide permanent boosts and quality-of-life improvements. These gamepasses can significantly impact how quickly you build a powerful anime squad, clear stages, and farm essential resources. Our comprehensive guide delves into the best **Anime Tactical Simulator gamepasses**, providing a detailed tier list and strategic advice to help you make informed purchasing decisions in 2026. Whether you're looking to gain an edge in combat, speed up resource gathering, or simply improve your overall game experience, understanding the value of each gamepass is key.

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Understanding Anime Tactical Simulator Gamepasses Tiers">

Gamepasses in Anime Tactical Simulator offer permanent advantages, ranging from increased unit slots to faster resource generation. To help you navigate the options, we've categorized them into a tier list, highlighting which ones provide the most significant benefits for your progression. Prioritizing S-tier gamepasses will ensure you get the best return on your investment, whether you're spending Robux or in-game Gems.

<CardGrid cols={4}>
  <Card title="S-Tier: Essential Boosts">
    - **Crucial for progression**
    - High impact on power
    - Buy first for maximum efficiency
  </Card>
  <Card title="A-Tier: Strong Enhancements">
    - **Great quality-of-life**
    - Decent perks and speed-ups
    - Excellent secondary purchases
  </Card>
  <Card title="B-Tier: Situational Value">
    - **Consider after S & A tiers**
    - Minor improvements
    - Avoid spending Robux on these
  </Card>
  <Card title="C-Tier: Low Impact">
    - **Generally not recommended**
    - Minimal gameplay effect
    - Save your resources for better options
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="tip" title="Pro Gamepass Strategy">
Always prioritize gamepasses that offer direct power increases, such as additional unit slots or improved card opening limits. These will give you the most significant advantage in clearing content and building your team.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="S-Tier Gamepasses: Maximize Your Power">

The S-Tier gamepasses are the most impactful purchases you can make in Anime Tactical Simulator. These passes provide crucial benefits that dramatically streamline your progression, allowing you to deploy more units and acquire better cards faster. Investing in these early will set you up for success.

| Gamepass          | Effect                                  | Price (Gems / Robux) | Priority |
| :---------------- | :-------------------------------------- | :------------------- | :------- |
| **+2 Units Equip** | Increases your unit slots by 2          | **4000 Gems / 399 Robux** | ★★★★★ |
| **Card Access**   | Open cards everywhere                   | **7000 Gems / 699 Robux** | ★★★★★ |
| **+3 Cards Open** | Open an additional 3 cards at a time    | **2500 Gems / 249 Robux** | ★★★★☆ |

<Callout type="success" title="Why S-Tier Matters">
Additional unit slots are arguably the most powerful upgrade in Anime Tactical Simulator, as they directly increase your team's on-field presence and damage output. "Card Access" and "+3 Cards Open" significantly speed up unit acquisition, which is vital for building a strong roster.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="A & B-Tier Gamepasses: Quality of Life and Moderate Boosts">

Once you've secured the S-tier gamepasses, you can look towards A and B-tier options. A-tier gamepasses offer excellent quality-of-life improvements and decent perks that further accelerate your progress. B-tier gamepasses provide more minor or situational boosts, best considered when you have ample resources.

### A-Tier Gamepasses: Good to Buy

These gamepasses provide solid benefits that complement your S-tier purchases, making various aspects of the game more efficient.

| Gamepass    | Effect                                  | Price (Gems / Robux) | Priority |
| :---------- | :-------------------------------------- | :------------------- | :------- |
| **x2 Golds**| Get double Gold/Yen from every source   | **3500 Gems / 349 Robux** | ★★★★☆ |
| **x2 Experience**| Units receive double XP from enemies    | **3000 Gems / 299 Robux** | ★★★☆☆ |

### B-Tier Gamepasses: Decent, But Not Essential

These are viable options if you've already acquired higher-tier gamepasses and have spare Gems. Avoid using Robux for these unless you have a specific need.

| Gamepass      | Effect                                       | Price (Gems / Robux) | Priority |
| :------------ | :------------------------------------------- | :------------------- | :------- |
| **Ultra Lucky** | Improves your Luck massively                 | **15000 Gems / 1499 Robux** | ★★☆☆☆ |
| **Super Lucky** | Great boost in Luck                          | **6000 Gems / 599 Robux** | ★★☆☆☆ |
| **Lucky**     | Improves your Luck by a decent amount        | **1000 Gems / 99 Robux** | ★☆☆☆☆ |
| **Fast Spins**| Spin the Wheel quicker                       | **2000 Gems / 199 Robux** | ★☆☆☆☆ |
| **Fast Rerolls**| Reroll quicker than normal                   | **7000 Gems / 699 Robux** | ★☆☆☆☆ |
| **VIP**       | Golden Nametag, 1.15x Golds, 1.05x EXP Gain  | **2500 Gems / 249 Robux** | ★★☆☆☆ |

<Callout type="warning" title="Robux vs. Gems">
Always prioritize using Gems for B-tier gamepasses if possible. Robux are a premium currency, and their value is better spent on the more impactful S-tier options or saved for future game updates.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="C-Tier Gamepasses & Smart Purchasing Strategy">

C-Tier gamepasses offer minimal impact on your gameplay and are generally not recommended for purchase. Understanding which gamepasses to avoid is just as important as knowing which ones to buy, ensuring you don't waste valuable resources.

### C-Tier Gamepasses: Don't Need to Buy

These gamepasses provide negligible benefits that won't significantly alter your progression or gameplay experience.

| Gamepass        | Effect                             | Price (Gems / Robux) | Recommendation |
| :-------------- | :--------------------------------- | :------------------- | :------------- |
| **Mega Storage**| Increases unit storage capacity greatly | **4000 Gems / 399 Robux** | Avoid          |
| **Small Storage**| Increases unit storage capacity slightly | **500 Gems / 49 Robux** | Avoid          |

### Strategic Gamepass Acquisition

Follow these steps to efficiently acquire the best gamepasses and optimize your Anime Tactical Simulator experience.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Prioritize S-Tier Passes">
    Focus on **+2 Units Equip**, **Card Access**, and **+3 Cards Open** first. These offer the most significant power spikes and efficiency gains, especially early in your game.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Consider A-Tier for Efficiency">
    After securing S-tier, look into **x2 Golds** and **x2 Experience**. These will accelerate your resource farming and unit leveling, further boosting your overall progression.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Evaluate B-Tier with Gems">
    If you have a surplus of Gems and have already acquired S and A-tier passes, B-tier options like **Lucky** or **VIP** can provide minor quality-of-life improvements. Avoid spending Robux here.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Avoid C-Tier Passes">
    Gamepasses like **Mega Storage** and **Small Storage** are not worth the investment. Unit storage is rarely a bottleneck, and there are better uses for your Gems or Robux.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Checklist
  id="gamepass-goals"
  title="Gamepass Purchasing Goals:"
  items={[
    "Acquire +2 Units Equip for maximum team size",
    "Secure Card Access for convenient card opening",
    "Obtain +3 Cards Open to speed up unit collection",
    "Invest in x2 Golds for faster Yen farming",
    "Utilize Tower Mode for free unit slots before buying storage"
  ]}
/>

<Callout type="info" title="Don't Overlook Free Alternatives">
While gamepasses offer convenience, remember that some benefits, like additional unit slots, can be earned through gameplay. For instance, Tower Mode offers up to four extra unit slots as milestone rewards. Always check for free options before making a purchase. You can find more details on progression at the [Anime Tactical Simulator Wiki](https://www.animetacticalsimulator.wiki/).
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Map} title="Gamepass Alternatives and Maximizing Value">

Beyond direct purchases, understanding how to maximize the value of your existing gamepasses and explore free alternatives is crucial for efficient progression in Anime Tactical Simulator. This includes leveraging in-game mechanics that offer similar benefits to certain gamepasses.

| Feature             | Gamepass Equivalent      | How to Obtain Free                                  | Value Comparison                                       |
| :------------------ | :----------------------- | :-------------------------------------------------- | :----------------------------------------------------- |
| **Unit Slots**      | +2 Units Equip           | Tower Mode (Floors 10, 25, 50, 100)                 | **Gamepass: Instant, Costly** / Free: Time-gated, No Cost |
| **Increased Luck**  | Lucky, Super Lucky, Ultra Lucky | Daily missions, event rewards, specific codes       | **Gamepass: Permanent, Consistent** / Free: Temporary, RNG-based |
| **XP Boosts**       | x2 Experience            | Daily missions, codes, certain unit traits          | **Gamepass: Permanent, Always Active** / Free: Limited duration |
| **Gold/Yen Boosts** | x2 Golds                 | Daily missions, codes, certain unit traits, VIP status | **Gamepass: Permanent, Always Active** / Free: Limited duration |
| **Fast Rerolls**    | Fast Rerolls             | Redeem codes (e.g., `DISCORD`), events              | **Gamepass: Permanent, Convenient** / Free: Intermittent availability |

<Callout type="tip" title="Smart Resource Management">
Focus on using your premium resources (Robux) on gamepasses that provide unique, otherwise unobtainable benefits, such as permanent unit slot increases. For boosts like luck or XP, leverage free codes and in-game events first.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Frequently Asked Questions About Anime Tactical Simulator Gamepasses">

We've compiled answers to common questions regarding **Anime Tactical Simulator gamepasses** to further assist you in making the best decisions.

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "What are the most important Anime Tactical Simulator gamepasses to buy first?",
    answer: "The most important gamepasses are those that increase your unit slots, such as '+2 Units Equip,' and those that enhance card acquisition, like 'Card Access' and '+3 Cards Open.' These provide the biggest boosts to your team's power and progression speed."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I get additional unit slots without buying gamepasses?",
    answer: "Yes, you can earn additional unit slots by progressing through Tower Mode. Key milestones like Floor 10, 25, 50, and 100 typically reward you with extra unit slots, offering a free alternative to gamepasses."
  },
  {
    question: "Should I buy 'Lucky' gamepasses?",
    answer: "Lucky gamepasses (Lucky, Super Lucky, Ultra Lucky) are generally B-tier. While they can improve your chances for better unit pulls, they are not as critical as unit slots or card access. Consider them only after acquiring S-tier passes, and ideally, use Gems instead of Robux."
  },
  {
    question: "Where can I find a complete list of Anime Tactical Simulator gamepasses and their effects?",
    answer: "A comprehensive tier list with gamepass effects and prices can be found on gaming sites like [Deltia's Gaming](https://deltiasgaming.com/roblox-anime-tactical-simulator-gamepass-tier-list/). This resource provides detailed information to guide your purchases."
  }
]} />

</Section>
